detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BANK_SAFE.Collect(uint256) (BANK_SAFE.sol#81-105):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (BANK_SAFE.sol#93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (BANK_SAFE.sol#97)
	BANK_SAFE.balances (BANK_SAFE.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BANK_SAFE.Collect(uint256) (BANK_SAFE.sol#81-105)
	- BANK_SAFE.Deposit() (BANK_SAFE.sol#65-77)
	- BANK_SAFE.balances (BANK_SAFE.sol#9)
